description: Runs via the Mend hosted Renovate GitHub App (installed on
wellmade-studio, scoped to this repo) — NOT a self-hosted CI runner:
this is a public repo, so we keep any write-scoped token off our own
Dependabot (see .github/dependabot.yml) was added for Docker FROM lines
and GitHub Actions. It does NOT track the `ARG xxx_VERSION` pins our
Dockerfiles use to download release binaries by URL — that is what this
Renovate config is for. The CLAUDE.md auto-update plan calls this the
'small migration' to Renovate once pin coverage became a limitation.
(Note: Renovate also manages GitHub Actions out of the box, so it now
overlaps Dependabot's github-actions entry — pick one owner; see CLAUDE.md.)
Each tracked ARG carries a `# renovate:` annotation above it in the
Dockerfile; the customManager below reads those annotations.
NODE_MAJOR is deliberately NOT tracked here: it is an LTS *floor*, bumped
by hand when a new Node LTS is adopted, never auto-narrowed.

customManagers.description: Bump `ARG xxx_VERSION` release-binary pins annotated with a renovate comment
